title: New Â£63 Million Boost for Britain's Electric Vehicle Revolution
content: Drivers across England are set to benefit as the government announces a Â£63 million investment package to supercharge Britainâ€™s electric vehicle infrastructure, driving down charging costs and putting money back in the pockets of working people as part of the Plan for Change. A pioneering Â£25 million scheme for local authorities will expand access to cheaper at-home charging. This will provide access to cheaper household rates, allowing consumers to save up to Â£1,500 a year compared to running a petrol or diesel car, transforming how thousands of households without driveways power up their electric cars.
author: Analysts Account
